entries.root_cause: .env is optional and absent in this workspace.
entries.action_taken: Left bootstrap optional; helper-based path resolution passes without direnv.
entries.remaining_risk: Developers do not get exported convenience vars unless they create .env.

entries.root_cause: direnv is not installed on this machine.
entries.action_taken: Kept direnv optional; non-interactive helper resolution remains PASS.
entries.remaining_risk: Shell bootstrap convenience is unavailable until direnv is installed.

entries.root_cause: External Windows Codex app-state backups predate this root-removal pass.
entries.action_taken: Left untouched because they are external user/app state, not repo authority.
entries.remaining_risk: Old app-state snapshots remain outside repo control and may confuse manual investigation.

entries.root_cause: Codex App client session still injects /mnt/c-backed launcher and tmp arg0 paths into PATH.
entries.action_taken: Kept canonical SSH runtime authoritative and blocked Windows launcher promotion instead of editing external PATH.
entries.remaining_risk: Local terminal evidence remains noisy and should not be used as authority.

entries.root_cause: Workspace dependency tools are disabled in current Codex App settings.
entries.action_taken: Reported only; authority/runtime verification does not require those tools.
entries.remaining_risk: Future tasks that need workspace dependency tooling will require settings change.

entries.action_taken: Reported blocker; no fake onboarding evidence was created.
entries.remaining_risk: Code-modification gate remains blocked until Serena onboarding is completed.

entries.action_taken: Reported blocker; no synthetic activation evidence was created.

entries.root_cause: Codex App has not yet proven that /home/andy4917/Dev-Management opened on devmgmt-wsl after cleanup.
entries.action_taken: Left user-facing app proof as manual evidence rather than reintroducing Windows bootstrap policy files.
